regional_cost_note: Surveyors in Invercargill typically charge $1,300–$3,800 for a boundary survey, $4,500–$28,000+ for subdivision, and $900–$2,800 for a building setout. Southland rates are typically 10–15% below the national average, though remote work may attract travel charges. Title searches and LIM reports are recommended before any boundary-related work — your surveyor can advise.
